response: solution the final approach avoids sorting by using a virtual index mapping to place median elements at even positions and larger elements at odd positions. solution this method ensures adjacent elements differ unless the input forces equality due to frequency constraints. solution the erroneous code likely failed by not handling duplicate medians correctly or by sorting which exceeds the O(n) time requirement. solution implementing the virtual index trick allows the algorithm to work efficiently for both positive and negative integers. solution the final step involves swapping elements in place to satisfy the wiggle condition without extra space.
